entries.answer: Hi! 👋 How can I help you? I can provide opening hours, entry rules, membership prices, class bookings, and other club information.
Thank you for contacting us. See you at the club! 👋 If you need anything else, feel free to ask.
No problem — happy to help! 😊
You're welcome! If you have more questions, I'm here to help.

questions: What are the club opening hours?
What time do you close on weekdays?
entries.answer: The club is open Monday to Friday from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM, and on weekends from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM.
Club entry is possible using the mobile app or a membership card. Each entry is registered in the system.

questions: How can I enter the club?
Can I enter using the app?
Do I need a membership card?
entries.answer: You can enter the club using the mobile app or your membership card.

questions: How much is a monthly membership?
Are there discounts for students or seniors?
entries.answer: Monthly memberships start from 139 PLN. Quarterly and annual plans are also available, with discounts for students and seniors.

questions: What membership types do you offer?
What's the difference between Open and Off-Peak?
Do you have a Family membership?
entries.answer: We offer Open, Off-Peak, Gym+Pool, and Family memberships. Details are available at reception and on our website.

questions: Do you offer different membership options?
entries.answer: The club offers various membership options tailored to different needs.
Monthly, quarterly, and annual memberships are available.

questions: What payment methods do you accept?
entries.answer: We accept card payments, BLIK, and recurring payments.
You can pay by card, BLIK, or via recurring payments.

questions: How does a membership freeze work?
entries.answer: You can freeze your contract once per year for up to 30 days. The freeze fee is 29 PLN.

questions: How do I terminate the contract?
Where do I sign the termination form?
entries.answer: Contract termination requires signing a form at reception. The notice period is one month.

questions: Can I transfer my membership to someone else?
How do I transfer a contract?
entries.answer: Membership can be transferred to another person for an administrative fee of 39 PLN.

questions: Where can I manage my contract?
entries.answer: All matters related to contracts are handled at the reception desk.

questions: What does the membership agreement define?
entries.answer: The membership agreement defines the terms of club usage.

questions: How do I book group classes?
Can I book classes in the app?
Where can I reserve a class?
entries.answer: Group classes can be booked via the mobile app or by contacting reception.

questions: How do I cancel a class?
When can I cancel a booking?
Is there a fee for late cancellation?
entries.answer: Classes can be canceled up to 2 hours before they start. After that, a fee applies according to the price list.

questions: How does the class capacity limit work?
entries.answer: The number of spots in group classes is limited. Bookings are processed on a first-come, first-served basis.

questions: What group classes do you offer?
entries.answer: The club offers a wide range of group classes.

questions: Where can I find the class schedule?
Is the timetable available in the app?
entries.answer: Group classes are conducted according to the schedule available in the app.

questions: Where can I find instructor information?
How do I check the class instructors?
entries.answer: Information about instructors can be found in the app or on the notice board near the fitness studio.
Our trainers conduct both group classes and personal training sessions.

questions: How can I book personal training?
Can I schedule a personal trainer?
Where do I book a PT session?
entries.answer: Personal training sessions can be booked at reception or directly with the selected trainer.

questions: How much does personal training cost?
entries.answer: Personal training prices start from 120 PLN per session. Discounted packages are available.

questions: What does a PT session involve?
entries.answer: Personal training allows for an individually tailored workout plan.

questions: Until what time is the pool open?
When is the last entry to the pool?
entries.answer: The swimming pool is available daily from 6:00 AM to 9:30 PM. Last entry is 45 minutes before closing.

questions: Can I use the swimming pool?
entries.answer: The swimming pool is available daily for members.

questions: Where is the swimming pool located?
Which area is the pool in?
entries.answer: The swimming pool is located in the wet zone of the club.

questions: When is the sauna area open?
Is the sauna open on weekends?
entries.answer: The sauna area is open from 2:00 PM to 10:00 PM on weekdays and from 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM on weekends.
The sauna area is available for members during designated hours.

questions: Which zone is the sauna in?
entries.answer: The sauna is located in the club’s wellness area.

questions: What if I forgot my locker PIN?
Who do I contact about locker issues?
entries.answer: Lockers operate with a PIN code. If you forget your code, please contact reception.

questions: Are lockers secured with a PIN?
entries.answer: Lockers are available in the changing rooms and secured with PIN codes.

questions: Do I need flip-flops for the showers?
entries.answer: Showers are available without limits. Please use your own flip-flops.

questions: What is in the changing rooms?
Do changing rooms have showers and lockers?
entries.answer: Changing rooms are equipped with showers and lockers.

questions: Can I get a towel at reception?
entries.answer: Towels are available at reception for an additional fee of 5 PLN. We recommend using a towel during workouts.

questions: Do I need to disinfect machines?
Should I put equipment back after use?
entries.answer: Please return equipment to its place after use and disinfect machines after training.

questions: What training equipment do you have?
entries.answer: Training equipment is available to all club members.

questions: How many hours of free parking do members get?
entries.answer: Members receive 2 hours of free parking. Please collect a ticket upon entry and keep it until exit.

questions: How many free parking hours do I get?
entries.answer: The club offers up to 2 hours of free parking for members.

questions: Where can I leave my bike?
Do I need my own lock?
entries.answer: Bike racks are located in front of the club. Please secure your bike with your own lock.

questions: Is cycling to the club possible?
entries.answer: You can access the club by bicycle.

questions: When is the Kids Zone open?
entries.answer: The Kids Zone is open on Saturdays and Sundays from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Children must be supervised by an adult.

questions: Can children be in the club?
What are the rules for children?
entries.answer: Children are allowed in the club only under adult supervision.

questions: Can someone under 16 use the club?
entries.answer: Persons under 16 years of age may use the club only under adult or trainer supervision.

questions: Where can I find the club rules?
Are the rules available at reception?
entries.answer: The club regulations are available on our website and at reception.

questions: Where do I collect lost items?
How long do you keep lost items?
entries.answer: Lost items can be collected at reception. Items are stored for 30 days.

questions: Where can I check maintenance notices?
entries.answer: Current maintenance works and area closures are announced on the information board and in the app.

questions: How will I be informed about closures?
entries.answer: Areas may be temporarily closed for cleaning. Information is provided in advance.

questions: What should I do in case of injury?
entries.answer: In case of injury or discomfort, immediately inform staff. An AED defibrillator is located at reception.

questions: What is the Wi‑Fi network name?
entries.answer: Free Wi-Fi is available throughout the club. Network name: FITNESS_WIFI, password: trening2024.

questions: Is internet available in the club?
entries.answer: Free Wi-Fi is available in the club.

questions: How do I get an invoice?
Can I receive an invoice by email?
Where do I request an invoice?
entries.answer: You can receive an invoice for your membership at reception or by email upon request.

questions: Payment and invoice matters—where to contact?
entries.answer: Payment and invoice-related matters are handled by reception.

questions: I have an issue with the app. What should I do?
The app doesn't work—how to fix it?
entries.answer: If you experience issues with the app, try updating it to the latest version or contact reception.

questions: What can I do in the app?
Can I enter using the app?
Can I book classes in the app?
entries.answer: The mobile app allows class bookings and club entry.
Thanks, I’m doing well! 😊 How can I assist you with the club?
I am the club’s virtual assistant. I help you quickly find information about hours, memberships, classes, and rules.
